task_updates.executor_notes: Added `_gate_existing_intent`, `_gate_fresh_intent_atomic`, and the deterministic test-receipt positive/negative/ambiguous handlers in `AdminChatCog`. The existing-intent gate requests the real payment, performs one status+`final_payment_id` intent update before the admin DM call, and the fresh-intent gate inserts the new intent with `awaiting_admin_approval` plus `final_payment_id` in the same create call; verified with `py_compile` and the focused payment pytest modules, including new direct unit coverage for the gate helpers and receipt handlers.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed `_gate_existing_intent` follows `request_payment` -> one `update_admin_payment_intent` call with both `status='awaiting_admin_approval'` and `final_payment_id` -> admin DM, and `_gate_fresh_intent_atomic` inserts the new intent with `awaiting_admin_approval` plus `final_payment_id` in the same `create_admin_payment_intent` call using a client-side UUID for metadata alignment.
